is an annual rugby union fixture held in late October between [The Royal Grammar School Worcester](/wiki/Royal_Grammar_School_Worcester "Royal Grammar School Worcester") (RGS) and [The King's School, Worcester](/wiki/King%27s_School,_Worcester "King's School, Worcester") (KSW). The match is traditionally played at [Sixways Stadium](/wiki/Sixways_Stadium "Sixways Stadium"), the home ground of Worcester Warriors. The fixture has been contested annually since 2007, with the exception of cancelled years.

The **Modus Challenge Cup** is an annual rugby union fixture held in late October between [The Royal Grammar School Worcester](/wiki/Royal_Grammar_School_Worcester "Royal Grammar School Worcester") (RGS) and [The King's School, Worcester](/wiki/King%27s_School,_Worcester "King's School, Worcester") (KSW). The match is traditionally played at [Sixways Stadium](/wiki/Sixways_Stadium "Sixways Stadium"), the home ground of Worcester Warriors. The fixture has been contested annually since 2007, with the exception of cancelled years.

## Head-to-head record

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Modus_Cup&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Head-to-head record")]

As of 2025, The King's School Worcester leads the series 10–6.
